All endpoints below accept the same API: All endpoints below accept the same API key. Choose based on your usage scenario.
All endpoints below accept the same API key. Pick the one that matches where you deploy and how much traffic you send — details for each option follow.
For servers and integrations outside mai: For servers and integrations outside mainland China. Prefer the acceleration node for sustained high-volume traffic; keep origin fallback as a backup.
Overseas relay node with generous bandwi: Overseas relay node with generous bandwidth over HTTPS. Suited to batch jobs, long streaming sessions, and large-scale API integrations.
Spacious bandwidth for batch jobs, long: Spacious bandwidth for batch jobs, long streaming sessions, and large-scale integrations; preferred for sustained high-volume workloads.
Your workloads run overseas and send sus: Your workloads run overseas and send sustained or heavy traffic — this is the default choice for most high-volume integrations.
Direct connection to origin NewAPI with: Direct connection to origin NewAPI with limited bandwidth — a fallback option when other overseas endpoints are unavailable.
Connects straight to origin NewAPI, bypa: Connects straight to origin NewAPI, bypassing the Edge layer. Bandwidth is limited; same API key and billing as the main site.
Direct connection to origin NewAPI; same: Direct connection to origin NewAPI; same API key and billing as the main site.
The acceleration node cannot be reached: The acceleration node cannot be reached from your network and you need a backup path — not for primary high-volume traffic.
The acceleration node is unreachable fro: The acceleration node is unreachable from your network, or you need a direct origin path — use this as a fallback, not for primary high-volume traffic.
For customers in mainland China; stable: For customers in mainland China; stable HTTPS access via CDN and edge protection for everyday API use.
For customers and integrations running i: For customers and integrations running inside mainland China.
Main site HTTPS entry via CDN and edge p: Main site HTTPS entry via CDN and edge protection. Stable for everyday API calls in the domestic network environment.
Your clients or servers are in mainland: Your clients or servers are in mainland China — choose this for routine integrations and general API usage.
For team members and internal systems on: For team members and internal systems only. Do not distribute this address to external customers.
If relay or direct nodes time out or fai: If relay or direct nodes time out or fail to connect, use this address instead.
If relay or direct nodes time out or fail to connect, use this address instead.
High-bandwidth relay node; uses the same: High-bandwidth relay node; uses the same API keys as the main site.
userDocs.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the text manually.
userDocs.subtitle: Register, create an API key, top up, pick models, and connect Codex, Cherry Studio, Infinite Canvas, and other tools. For developer API docs, switch to the API Reference tab.
apiDocs.subtitle: Platform API overview. Unified flows below; per-model request fields and sample JSON open from the model links.
modelDoc.authHint: Authorization: Bearer sk-your-token. Failed tasks are usually not billed; see Model Square for pricing details.
modelDoc.pickerHint: Click a model below to open its endpoints, sample JSON, and field notes (same as View document on model cards).
modelDoc.pickerEmpty: No per-model API profiles available to display.
modelDoc.generationModesHint: The server infers the mode from material fields; no mode parameter is required.
modelDoc.apiDocJsonHint: Drives the View document dialog. Single mode: dispatch_mode. Dual mode (e.g. gpt-image-2): modes.async and modes.sync. Video generation modes: generation_modes array. Use {{model}} and {{base}}; use examples array for multiple samples.
Automatically delete finished async task: Automatically delete finished async task logs older than this many days. Set to 0 to disable scheduled cleanup.
Registry settings help: Default profile and per-api_mode poll defaults for this capability; read by Infinite Canvas.
Default profile id help: Models without a dedicated binding fall back to this ID; must match a profile_id below.
Poll defaults help: Map api_mode to delayMs / maxAttempts, e.g. {"videos-json-async":{"delayMs":5000,"maxAttempts":120}}.
No profile matched; will use default: No profile matched; will use default
Profile templates help: Each profile defines canvas UI controls and the HTTP path; bind models on the Model bindings tab.
Model profile bindings help: Pick video/image profiles per model. Leave empty to use the global default profile.
Profile id help: Unique id aligned with seed data or gz-video-* naming; cannot be changed after creation.
API mode help: Which NewAPI video endpoint Infinite Canvas uses; must match the channel capability.
POST /v1/videos with JSON body (GZ paylo: POST /v1/videos with JSON body (GZ payload: multi-ref image/video/audio, frame inputs).
POST /v1/videos as multipart FormData (O: POST /v1/videos as multipart FormData (OpenAI Sora-style: seconds, size, input_reference[]).
POST /v1/videos with JSON body, poll GET: POST /v1/videos with JSON body, poll GET /v1/videos/{id} (Omni, Seedance, veo-clean, etc.).
POST /v1/chat/completions streaming; vid: POST /v1/chat/completions streaming; video URL returned inline (oairegbox-grok-video, etc.).
Poll status help: strict: fail on unexpected task states; relaxed: retry through intermediate states.
Requires reference media help: When enabled, users must upload at least one reference image before generating.
Reference limits help: Format {"images":1,"videos":0,"audios":0} to cap reference image/video/audio counts.
Poll override help: Override global poll settings with {"delayMs":5000,"maxAttempts":120}; use {} to inherit defaults.
Parameter toggles help: Show controls in canvas when checked; configure options in the JSON block below.
Params JSON help: Full per-param config (enabled, options, min/max, etc.), same shape as params in model_ui_params_*.json seed files.
Option rules help: Disable options by model match, e.g. [{"param":"duration","value":"15","disabledWhen":{"modelIncludes":"flash"}}].
Admin note help: Visible in admin only; does not affect canvas behavior.
Canvas users may need to refresh the pag: Canvas users may need to refresh the page
Multiple internal models map to the same: Multiple internal models map to the same public name. Add aliases to resolve ambiguity.
Override automatic prefix stripping when: Override automatic prefix stripping when multiple internals share a public name.
Registry is ready. Prefix stripping and: Registry is ready. Prefix stripping and aliases are applied to inbound and outbound model names.
Removing a prefix stops automatic stripp: Removing a prefix stops automatic stripping for matching internal names.
Strip these prefixes from internal abili: Strip these prefixes from internal ability names when exposing public model names.
This internal model will fall back to pr: This internal model will fall back to prefix stripping rules.
Whitelisted users bypass local keyword b: Whitelisted users bypass local keyword blocking; upstream content review failures are not refunded.
When disabled, prompts are forwarded to: When disabled, prompts are forwarded to upstream; non-whitelisted users will be refunded when upstream content review rejects the request.
Connect enterprise systems and product b: Connect enterprise systems and product backends to multiple model families through one stable API gateway.
A consistent request format for backend: A consistent request format for backend systems, automation workflows and internal tools.
Request-level logs, usage visibility and: Request-level logs, usage visibility and pay-as-you-go billing for product teams.
Stable gateway design with operational v: Stable gateway design with operational visibility and long-term maintenance.
Compatible with OpenAI API format — one: Compatible with OpenAI API format — one gateway for CLI tools and visual creation.
AI visual workflow for image generation,: AI visual workflow for image generation, editing and asset management.
Model coverage for modern AI products: Model coverage for modern AI products
Use one integration layer to choose the: Use one integration layer to choose the right model by capability, cost and availability.
Quick integration without changing your: Quick integration without changing your workflow
Sign up and access your dashboard in min: Sign up and access your dashboard in minutes.
Create an API key for secure authenticat: Create an API key for secure authentication.
Use a single endpoint for all model requ: Use a single endpoint for all model requests.
Monitor usage, trace requests and optimi: Monitor usage, trace requests and optimize continuously.
Supports a wide range of model providers: Supports a wide range of model providers
Try image generation and editing in the: Try image generation and editing in the browser — no sign-in required.
at a fraction of the cost: at a Fraction of the Cost
Home pricing preview subtitle: Text, image, video, audio, and music models are shown in separate tables with different billing units.
Home pricing preview split hint: Up to 12 text, 8 image/video, and 6 audio/music models; at most 2 per model family. See the model marketplace for the full list.
Home image pricing description: Billed per image or request; prices include platform markup. See each row for the exact unit.
Home video pricing description: Billed per second of output where applicable; some models use per-request pricing — see the unit suffix on each row.
Home audio pricing description: TTS, speech recognition, and related models. Per-request units are shown on each row; token models use per-1M-token pricing.
Home music pricing description: Suno, Udio, and similar music models — billed per track/request; see the unit suffix on each row.
Home official pricing footnote: Official I/O and savings use public prices from models.dev (same source as the admin “models.dev pricing preset”); per-request or video models may show — when unmatched.
Home showcase CDN subtitle: Curated static CDN assets — no API fetch on each page load.
Fixed pricing — what you see is what you: Fixed pricing — what you see is what you pay. No fluctuation with network load, no hidden coefficient.
Save = discount vs. official Anthropic /: Save = discount vs. official Anthropic / OpenAI API pricing.
Showing up to {{count}} public models; a: Showing up to {{count}} public models; at most {{max}} per model family. See the model marketplace for the full list.
The simplest way to use frontier AI mode: The simplest way to use frontier AI models — no barriers, no subscriptions, no restrictions.
Access Claude, GPT and more from anywher: Access Claude, GPT and more from anywhere. Email signup only, flexible payment, privacy protected.
Official model capabilities — same conte: What you get is the official model — same context window, same capabilities, same output. No tweaks, no trimming, no compromise.
Claude Opus, Sonnet, GPT, Gemini — switc: Claude Opus, Sonnet, GPT, Gemini — switch freely between models. No separate subscriptions required.
Drop-in replacement for Anthropic & Open: Drop-in replacement for Anthropic & OpenAI APIs. Change one URL in your code, save up to 90%.
Three simple steps. No credit card, no p: Three simple steps. No credit card, no phone number, no hassle.
Top up your balance. Pay as little as yo: Top up your balance. Pay as little as you need.
Use our API or compatible tools. Same as: Chat in browser or use our API. Same as Claude & OpenAI.
Email + verification code. No credit car: Email + verification code. No credit card, no KYC.
Start now — it's free to sign up: Start Now — It's Free to Sign Up
Visual works from the canvas asset libra: Visual Works from the Canvas Asset Library
Curated CDN assets from the canvas promp: Curated CDN assets from the canvas prompt library — posters, portraits, product visuals and more.
